meanings.definition: a small reddish planet that is the 4th from the sun and is periodically visible to the naked eye; minerals rich in iron cover its surface and are responsible for its characteristic color
(Roman mythology) Roman god of war and agriculture; father of Romulus and Remus; counterpart of Greek Ares
the month following February and preceding April
a mark or flaw that spoils the appearance of something (especially on a person's body)
